items.name: Global 2026 (ANS International Fuel Cycle Conference)
items.participation: Present technical papers/Exhibit/Network on fuel cycle and reprocessing topics
items.speaker: Fuel-cycle technical leaders from DOE national labs, industry and academia
items.relevance: ANS's flagship international fuel-cycle meeting covering reprocessing, closed fuel cycles and advanced fuels - directly aligned with newcleo's MOX/closed fuel cycle strategy and US Savannah River ambitions

items.name: Nuclear Energy Conference & Expo (NECX) 2026
items.organizer: Nuclear Energy Institute (NEI) / American Nuclear Society (ANS) listing
items.dates: August 24-27, 2026 (per NEI conference calendar; cross-referenced with ANS national conference listing for Dallas, TX)
items.participation: Exhibit/Sponsor/Network with US utilities, policymakers and supply chain
items.speaker: Not yet confirmed
items.relevance: Major US industry conference and expo for utilities, supply chain and policymakers, relevant to newcleo's US market entry, though full programme/organizer details are not yet fully confirmed on a single primary source

items.name: World Nuclear Symposium 2026 (51st Symposium)
items.participation: Speak/Exhibit/Sponsor/Network - Finance Summit, Energy Users Summit, B2B meetings, exhibition, member Working Groups (7-9 Sept)
items.speaker: Sama Bilbao y León (WNA DG) and other bellwether nuclear CEOs typically headline; newcleo could pursue a spotlight session or panel slot on fast reactors/fuel cycle/financing
items.relevance: Premier global gathering of the entire nuclear value chain (fuel supply, fabrication, financing, policy, newcomer countries) - ideal for newcleo to engage investors, fuel-cycle partners and governments

items.name: IAEA General Conference 2026
items.participation: Side-events/Networking - government and industry side-meetings typically run alongside the plenary
items.speaker: Rafael Mariano Grossi (IAEA Director General) and member-state delegations
items.relevance: The IAEA's premier annual policy gathering of member states; key venue for government/regulatory engagement on advanced reactors, fuel cycle and plutonium disposition topics relevant to newcleo's Slovak, French and Savannah River activities

items.name: GIF Symposium 2026
items.participation: Attend/Network - GIF symposia gather Gen IV technology developers, member governments and industry advisory panel
items.speaker: GIF System Steering Committee leads and Senior Industry Advisory Panel members
items.relevance: GIF is the core intergovernmental forum for Gen IV/lead-cooled fast reactor R&D cooperation (France, UK, Switzerland, US, Euratom are members) - a priority venue per newcleo's LFR-AS-200 technology roadmap

items.name: 2026 ANS Winter Conference & Expo (with embedded ICAPP 2026, Advanced Reactor Safety 2026, Advances in Thermal Hydraulics 2026)
items.participation: Exhibit/Sponsor/Technical papers - embedded topicals on advanced reactors and safety are directly relevant
items.speaker: Senior DOE, NRC and advanced-reactor developer executives typically headline plenaries
items.relevance: Major US nuclear science/technology and expo gathering with embedded topicals (ICAPP - advanced nuclear power plants; Advanced Reactor Safety) matching newcleo's Gen IV/LFR technical positioning and US market entry

items.name: International Uranium Fuel Seminar 2026
items.dates: Annually in October (2025 edition held Oct 27-29 in Charleston, SC); 2026 dates not yet published
items.participation: Attend/Network with uranium industry, fuel fabricators and traders
items.speaker: Utility fuel managers, converters, enrichers and fuel brokers
items.relevance: Annual gathering of the global uranium/fuel supply industry relevant to newcleo's MOX and fuel-cycle interests; South Carolina venue aligns with Savannah River focus, but 2026 dates are not yet confirmed on NEI's site
